commands.summary: RP00 control-plane contract validation passed for RP00.P01.M03.S06 with status implemented.

Law Firm OS product contract validation passed with modules 9/9, principles 9/9, invariants 7/7.
Weighted implementation ledger validation passed with 3,300 source micro phases and 54,355 implementation subphases.
Full microphase plan validation passed with 30 release programs, 10 standard phases, and 3,300 micro phases.

Node test suite passed 43/43 tests, including HermesGate ownership metadata fail-closed tests.

evidence_summary.implemented: HermesGate ownership metadata binds owner_module, owner_role, steward_ref, correction_route, may_reference, and may_not_mutate.
evidence_summary.tests: Model tests and the RP00 control-plane validator execute the ownership metadata policy and failure cases.
evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval decisions are referenced as a mutation boundary and are not approved, replaced, or modified by this subphase.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
This command evidence is read-only validation evidence for RP00.P01.M03.S06 and does not write product state.
Relationship maps remain deferred to RP00.P01.M03.S07; required field registries, transition maps, and validation helpers remain deferred.
